stemHtml: When the term "Scattered" is used in an aviation routine weather report (METAR), what is the amount of cloud covering the sky?

options.a: More than half but less than the full sky is covered(5 to 7 octas).
options.b: Half or less than half of the sky is covered(3 or 4 octas).
options.c: The sky is clear below 5000 feet/GND.
options.d: The sky is entirely covered (8 octas).
